name: NSG allows unrestricted RDP access (0.0.0.0/0)
description: A Network Security Group has an inbound rule allowing RDP (TCP/3389) from any source (0.0.0.0/0 or *). This exposes Windows VMs to BlueKeep, credential brute-force, and ransomware delivery over the internet.
remediation: Remove the open RDP rule. Use Azure Bastion for browser-based RDP with no public IP or open ports. Alternatively, restrict the source to a known management IP range. Enable Just-In-Time VM access via Defender for Cloud to limit exposure window.
